document_summary: This exhibit presents the official responsibilities of the Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of China. It lists 16 major areas of responsibility including drawing up education policies, managing higher education, guiding scientific research at universities, conferring academic degrees, and international educational cooperation. This establishes the Ministry of Education as a top-level government authority, reinforcing the credibility and prestige of the MOE Outstanding Achievement Award that Liu received.

snippets.text: # The Ministry of Education shall be responsible for:
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education
snippets.reasoning: Title establishing this as the official list of responsibilities of China's Ministry of Education.

snippets.text: To draw up strategies, policies and plans for educational reform and development; and to draft relevant rules and regulations, and supervise their implementation.
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education
snippets.reasoning: First responsibility showing MOE's authority over national educational policy and regulation, establishing it as the highest education authority in China.

snippets.text: To plan and guide the research by institutions of higher education in natural sciences, philosophy and social sciences; to coordinate and guide the institutions of higher education to take part in developing the national innovation system, and undertake the State's key projects and programmes for the development of science and technology; to guide the construction and development of the scientific and technological innovation of institutions of higher education; to direct the informatisation of education and promote the integration of production, teaching and research.
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education
snippets.reasoning: Directly relevant responsibility: MOE plans and guides research in higher education in social sciences (Liu's field), establishing it as the proper authority to recognize outstanding research achievements.

snippets.text: To take charge of the work of the conferring of academic degrees; to be responsible for the implementation of the conferral system for academic degrees; to be responsible for the work towards international reciprocity in academic degrees, mutual recognition of academic degrees and so on.
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education
snippets.reasoning: MOE's responsibility for conferring academic degrees and international degree recognition, further establishing its authority in academic achievement evaluation.

entities.name: Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of China
entities.identity: Chinese government ministry responsible for national education policy, higher education management, scientific research guidance, and academic degree conferral
